partition.description: Slurm partition name (e.g. 'cpu', 'gpu-a100'). Must exist in sinfo output.

gpus.description: GPUs required PER NODE. 0 = CPU-only. A node is a candidate only if it has at least this many free GPUs.

nodes.description: Number of nodes required. available_now=true iff at least this many candidate nodes exist.

cpus_per_node.description: CPUs required PER NODE. A node is a candidate only if it has at least this many free CPUs.
